sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61602" key="laqraio/koitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαθρ-αιόκοιτος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n61602.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">adulterer, fornicator</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:75:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">75.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
